allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: ''''***'''' if ''''token'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''secret'''' in k.lower\(\) else v for k,v in d.items\(\) if not isinstance\(v, dict\)}, indent=2\)\)")
